conclusion: The d5_280 line bit is compatible with exact families on the checked search moduli, but it is not by itself enough to finish the five-color assembly problem. In the best time-limited run, the Hamilton-color counts are 3 on m=7 and only 2 on m=9,11,13.
family: Refine the d5_277/d5_279 Route-E family by adding the d5_280 line bit line7 = 1_{x3!=m-1, x4!=m-1, x0+3x1+x3+3x4=7 mod m} and the d5_279 one-point source bit U = 1_{x=(m-1,6,m-1,m-1,m-1)}.
